BalanceDelta","name":"delta","type":"tuple"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"MockPoolManager Simulates Uniswap v4 PoolManager on Arc testnet (no official v4 deployment exists yet). Calls beforeSwap and afterSwap on the registered hook, mimicking exactly what the real PoolManager does. Data flow:   Trader calls swap()     \u2192 MockPoolManager calls hook.beforeSwap()  [hook may revert or return fee override]     \u2192 MockPoolManager executes simulated swap   [USDC transfer between parties]     \u2192 MockPoolManager calls hook.afterSwap()    [hook settles agent payment]     \u2192 MockPoolManager emits SwapExecuted To upgrade to real PoolManager: deploy AgentSwapHook pointing at the real address. No changes to AgentSwapHook needed \u2014 it only reads msg.sender == poolManager.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/MockPoolManager.sol":"MockPoolManager"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"contracts/MockPoolManager.sol":{"keccak256":"0xfd49df3799e599573de24175442268ffb3e5c9f2e2bcbffe45a395ea8201e512","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://50652f9a39e1f17d3e0a01f835534aea669cf5c13ddc70098d7542eb205b8c3e","dweb:/ipfs/QmPGRy1fWyA1vn7yxmyuRQ69dePzsFrGzy9fDHKDuvP9mt"]},"contracts/interfaces/IUniswapV4.sol":{"keccak256":"0x083f99d3e55fd7607091fefd1291de1c4333486abd5b68da7a32444e058bb1c7","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://61babc0c9b5244e2d91d3ed7e56dafcd6e4bef9c672197733049d3eaf21d40b2","dweb:/ipfs/QmQSxjocxkdWCcrNANT8Hgz7euusNd7dbiCBuwBk3d6hMc"]}},"version":1}
